mnemonics: WILL = What Impacts, Limitations, and Level of Automation
keyPoints: Automation is not an all-or-nothing choice; it exists on a spectrum from full human control to full autonomy.
The goal of Human-Centred AI is to design automation that augments human capabilities, rather than simply replacing them.
Successful automation requires careful consideration of the human's role, the context of use, and the potential for unintended consequences.
commonMistakes: Assuming that full automation is always the best or most desirable outcome.
Focusing solely on technical feasibility without considering the human and societal impact.
Underestimating the complexity of handing control back to a human operator in an automated system when needed.
